name: MSI PRO B840M-P WIFI6E Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8000(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbps Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11ax 2x2 Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3 (PROB840MPWIFI6E)
shortName: MSI PRO B840M-P WIFI6E Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: MSI micro-ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with DDR5 support and Wi-Fi 6E connectivity.
